name: WLF_PROVIDER_ATTENDANCE
description: Table to store provider attendance information.

columns.Name: ATTENDANCE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_ATTENDANCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: PROVIDER_ATTENDANCE_NUMBER

columns.Name: PROVIDER_BOOKING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates provider booking id

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates meeting id

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates assignment task id

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates learning item id

columns.Name: LEARNER_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates learner id

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates start time of the meeting

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates end time of the meeting

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Indicates the duration of the call attended

columns.Name: ATTENDEE_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Indicates attendee email id

columns.Name: DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates attendee display name.

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the attendee is an instructor.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Indicates additional information of an attendance.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
